name: Your Name
title: Graphic Designer & 3D Artist
intro: I create bold visual identities, cinematic 3D worlds, event concepts, AI-driven visuals, and motion-ready storyboards for brands that need to stand out.
about: I work across graphic design, 3D art direction, event storytelling, and AI-assisted production. My focus is creating complete visual worlds: from campaign look and feel to environments, characters, posters, social content, and motion prompts.
contactText: For branding, 3D visual concepts, event campaign visuals, AI image direction, or motion design storyboards, reach out and let’s build something memorable.

services.title: Brand Identity
services.text: Logo systems, key visuals, campaign directions, social templates, and premium visual languages.

services.title: 3D Art Direction
services.text: Stylized environments, 3D characters, claymation concepts, object design, and cinematic scenes.

services.title: Event Concepts
services.text: Immersive corporate event themes, activation ideas, venue design, stickers, signage, and print assets.

services.title: Motion Storyboards
services.text: Start/end frames, scene sequencing, camera movement, AI video prompts, and dynamic storytelling.
